docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES VARGAS, DANIEL EDGARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AUHTORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $105 SERVED MAY-23-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES VARGAS, DANIEL EDGARDO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL EDGARDO FLORES VARGAS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 07/28/2025. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
